title: Enrichment block
description: Operator-config schema for the `enrichment:` block (RFC-088 / Epic #1101 chunk 1).

enabled.description: Master switch for the enrichment pass. Defaults to true; set false to disable enrichment for the corpus.

max_total_cost_usd_per_run.description: Run-wide hard cost cap (O1 decision, REPLAN-O7 enforcement). When the total accumulated cost across all enrichers in a run exceeds this, the executor aborts the pass and marks subsequent enrichers `skipped` with reason `run_cost_cap_exceeded`.

fail_on_run_cost_cap.description: When true (default), exceeding `max_total_cost_usd_per_run` causes a non-zero exit code. When false, the abort is silent (run logs warning but completes with exit_code=0).

enrichers.description: Per-enricher configuration (id → overrides). Shape B (RFC-088 v2): presence of a block enables the enricher (implicit `enabled: true`); add `enabled: false` to opt out. `null` (bare key) means 'enabled, no config'.

enabled.description: Optional explicit toggle. Defaults to true when the block is present; set false to opt out without removing the block (lets you preserve knobs across toggles).

opt_in.description: Required double-opt-in flag for LLM-tier enrichers (manifest.requires_opt_in=true). Both the block-present-or-`enabled: true` rule AND `opt_in: true` must hold for LLM-tier enrichers to run.

max_cost_usd_per_run.description: Per-enricher soft cost budget. When the enricher's accumulated cost in a run exceeds this, the executor quarantines it (`status: quarantined`, reason `cost_cap_exceeded`); other enrichers continue.

expected_duration_s.description: Hard timeout for the enricher's whole run. Defaults to 60s episode-scope / 600s corpus-scope when unset.

provider.description: Provider/scorer injection config for ML / embedding / NLI enrichers. Required by enrichers that declare `manifest.provider_requirement`; ignored by deterministic enrichers.
